case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. RAYMOND MARTIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED AUG-14-2014, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, RAYMOND

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, RAYMOND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1190 MISSION STREET, #1111 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, RAYMOND DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED AUG-14-2014, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, RAYMOND
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, RAYMOND
DECLARATION RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
